headline: Chewy (CHWY) Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates
summary: Chewy (CHWY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -3.57% and +0.27%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
